context:
💡AILOCK
========
📌Initially appeared in March 2025
📌The earliest victim is traced to 10th April 2025
📌Written in C/C++ language and appends extension (.AiLock) to the encrypted files.
📌Listed 18 victims as of now
📌Most targeted country is US
📌Stores each victims data on a dedicated Onion Domain
📌AILOCK greets with following message on their DLS "Good morning. Thou hast had a good night's sleep, I hope."
📌They claim they are from 2024 via their trademark "AiLock © Since 2024"
📌Hosts large files as many exceeds >100GB
📌Each Victims are listed with 3 sections namely: List of Files, Password, Part 01/02
📌Every single password is exactly 128 characters long (High Entropy).
📌Unlike other ransomware groups, this group does not provide any Contact

MD5
====
